name: The Hive (Pi 5 — The Comb launcher kiosk)
description: Pi OS Lite (Bookworm, 64-bit) + two-phase first-boot install. Phase 1 sets up brocoli user + SSH/WiFi/hostname + tty1 autologin. Phase 2 installs Node 20, the @anthropic-ai/claude-code CLI, Tor with LAN SOCKS5, X11 + Chromium + openbox, ttyd, the RTL8821AU DKMS driver for AC600 dongles (kernel pinned to 6.12 for driver compat), and the The Comb launcher app at /opt/the-comb. After two reboots the HDMI auto-shows The Comb fullscreen pointing at https://sinsera.co/the-comb/. Marker file `TheHive` at /boot and /home/brocoli.

preconfigured.user: brocoli (password 'brocoli', NOPASSWD sudo, SSH key + password auth both enabled)
preconfigured.autologin: tty1 → brocoli (HDMI runs X kiosk on tty7)
preconfigured.tor: tor + torsocks; SOCKS5 on 0.0.0.0:9050 with LAN-only policy
preconfigured.ttyd: ttyd + claude-launch wrapper on :7777 (cd to /mnt/stick/the-comb if STICK USB plugged in)
preconfigured.kiosk: ark-kiosk.service runs X on tty7 + Chromium --start-fullscreen at https://sinsera.co/the-comb/
preconfigured.ac600_driver: morrownr/8821au-20210708 via DKMS, kernel pinned to 6.12

first_boot_sequence: Phase 1 (~30s): firstrun.sh sets up brocoli user + SSH + WiFi + hostname + tty1 autologin. Reboots.
Phase 2 (~5-8 min): apt-installs the runtime stack (Node + X + Chromium + Tor + ttyd), DKMS-builds rtl8821au, configures everything, enables services. Reboots.
Phase 3 (~15s): HDMI shows The Comb launcher fullscreen. Tiles for Claude / Ark / Ragnar / RaspyJack / Flipper / Jailbreak / Payroll / Tor.
